tools.name: speech_to_text
tools.description: Convert speech audio to text using Amazon Transcribe. Accepts base64 encoded audio files in supported formats (wav, mp3, mp4, flac, ogg, amr, webm).

user_id.description: The user ID for organizing transcription files

session_id.description: The session ID for organizing transcription files

filename.description: Original filename with extension to determine format

file_format.description: Audio file format (optional if filename has extension)

tools.name: generate_aactt_plan
tools.description: Generate a structured AACTT (Action, Actor, Context, Target, Time) plan for older adults focusing on health and wellness activities.

action_type.description: Type of activities to include in the plan. Currently supports 'physical'

tools.name: create_session
tools.description: Create a new chat session for a user with Gemini AI assistant.

user_id.description: The user ID to create session for

api_key.description: Gemini API key (optional if set in environment)

tools.name: get_weather_forecast
tools.description: Get weather forecast data for a specified location.

location.description: Location name for weather forecast (defaults to 'Australia')

tools.name: check_outdoor_weather
tools.description: Check if weather conditions are suitable for outdoor activities at a specific location and time.

location.description: Location name to check weather for

tools.name: chat_with_gemini
tools.description: Send a simple chat message to Gemini AI and get a response.
